title: milium wilcoxianum
intro: Milium wilcoxianum, also known as Wilcox's milium, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Poaceae family. It is a perennial grass that is native to North America and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as prevent the growth of certain microorganisms. Milium wilcoxianum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and has been used to treat a variety of health issues, including wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems.
